texto: For some time, I thought being a producer would be a more fulfilling career than being an actor. But then I went to a conference in Cannes with 300 other producers, all desperately chasing finance for their projects... and realized being an actor wasn't so bad after all!
explicacao: Citação de William Kircher sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “For some time, I thought being a producer would be a more fulfilling career than being an actor. …” articula trabalho, time, thought em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como thought e career.
